channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Htdp
item.description: Table Of Contents Arithmetic Please complete the readings or watch the videos before class. This will allow us to focus on problem solving during the labs. Arithmetic What is computation? Performing arithmetic in BSL. Primitive types: Number, Image, Boolean, String Define constants Simple animations with animate Predicate functions Using the Dr.Racket’s Stepper Readings & Videos * indicates that material is supplementary Prologue 1.1-1.4 2.1-2.5 (71 minutes) programs in the world* arithmetic is computing* Expressions How racket evaluates expressions Strings and images Define constants Functions Booleans How to use Racket’s steppe Looking stuff up in the documentation Assignments Homework 1 Arithmetic Lab 1

item.title: Lorem Ipsum
item.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
